nodes.label: Nourah App Icon (Primary)
nodes.description: Primary app icon for Nourah used by iOS and general app metadata. Currently a placeholder/wireframe-style design: three concentric circles centered on a light gray grid background, suggesting a target or radial brand glyph. No final brand color or typographic mark is applied yet — this appears to be a temporary scaffolding icon awaiting final brand artwork.

nodes.label: Concentric Circles Brand Glyph
nodes.description: The visual mark contained in the primary icon: three nested rings of decreasing radius drawn in a muted lavender-gray stroke over a faint square grid. Conveys focus, layers, or a radar/target metaphor — fitting a skincare/scanning product like Nourah where the user's face is the analytical center. Likely placeholder pending final brand identity.

nodes.label: Splash Icon Image
nodes.description: Splash screen icon asset displayed during Nourah app launch. Shows a placeholder/default Expo-style design with concentric circles centered on a light grid background — appears to be the default Expo splash icon rather than a custom Nourah-branded asset. Dimensions roughly 1024x1024, light gray on white.

nodes.label: Splash Screen Brand Imprint
nodes.description: First brand impression delivered to users when launching the Nourah app. Currently uses default placeholder geometry (concentric circles on a grid) rather than custom Nourah branding — indicates the splash visual identity has not yet been finalized.

nodes.label: Home Tab Icon
nodes.description: Tab bar icon for the Home tab. A stylized house illustration in deep burgundy/maroon with a soft pink facade, a small red/pink circular accent (window) on the front, an arched doorway, and a decorative leafy plant at the base-left. Used as the visual identifier for the Home tab in the bottom tab navigator.

nodes.label: Products Tab Icon
nodes.description: Tab bar icon for the Products tab. Illustration of a pink pump bottle with a leaf motif beside a pink cream tube with a droplet design, accented with leaves. Soft pastel palette with mauve and gold highlights, conveying skincare/cosmetic products.

nodes.label: Profile Tab Icon
nodes.description: Tab bar icon for the Profile tab. Circular illustration of a woman's profile silhouette (side view) with a dark burgundy hair bun, soft pink skin tone, enclosed in a gradient ring transitioning from pink to gold, with a small four-pointed sparkle accent. Conveys a feminine, skincare-oriented identity aligned with the Nourah brand.

metadata.usage: Tab bar icon for the Profile tab in the (tabs) navigation layout
metadata.style: illustrated, soft pastel palette, gradient ring, minimal line art
metadata.subject: female profile silhouette with hair bun and sparkle

nodes.label: Scan Tab Icon
nodes.description: Tab bar icon for the Scan tab. Illustrated image of a woman's face with closed eyes wearing a pink headband, framed by camera-style corner brackets and a smile-shaped curve with dots beneath the chin, suggesting facial scanning/analysis.

links.description: The concentric-circles glyph is the visual content of the primary icon image.
